title: ENG 101 | Course Content Formatting & Protocols
content:
ENG 101 | Course Content Formatting & Protocols

📌 1. Adaptive Structure Per Week

Each week/module will follow the same format but will have an adjusted number of slides, knowledge checks, and assignments based on Canvas.

Instead of a fixed 17-section model, each week will be structured as follows:

📌 1.1 Required Core Sections (Always Included)

✅ 1️⃣ Overview (Introduction to the week’s topics, themes, and objectives)
✅ 2️⃣ Learning Outcomes (Course-level & weekly objectives with assessment mapping)
✅ 3️⃣ Expectations & Readings (Assigned readings, Canvas presentations, and activities for the week)
✅ 4️⃣ Major Lecture (Foundations of the Week’s Topic) (The primary instructional content for the week)
✅ 5️⃣ Weekly Writing Warm-Up (Assignment with prompt, rubric, and submission details)
